title: Spooky Scary Jockeys
description: Putting the 'trick' back into trick or treat™ - MMD SpookyJam 2021
body:
[![BisectHosting](https://i.imgur.com/6AzSqYg.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/ACGaming)

# 🦇 **Spooky Scary Jockeys** 💀

###### Putting the 'trick' back into trick or treat™

![](https://i.imgur.com/uayg09v.png)

This mod adds various new jockeys, the spookiest combinations you'll probably get! Originally made for the MMD SpookyJam in 2021.

### Skeleton Bat Jockeys

_The night is dark and full of terrors._

**Large Bats** are the bigger and badder counterpart of regular bats with a desire for the player's blood! They will track, surround and swoop attack the player, similar to phantoms.
But they are not alone: With their loyal **Skeleton Riders** on their heads, they are a dangerous threat at both close range and from a distance!
When you get real unlucky, you might encounter a wither skeleton variant which is especially hard to see in the night sky.

### Wither Skeleton Ghast Jockeys

_From afar, a flame arises._

**Small Ghasts** are the slightly faster counterpart of ghasts with the inability to shoot fireballs. Instead, they got **Sniper Wither Skeletons** on their enormous heads which will shoot fiery arrows from up to 100 blocks away!

### Vex Bat Jockeys (1.17+)

_Even walls won't save you._

**Vex Bats** are the vex counterpart of bats, carrying pesky vexes even faster through the air. They are quite rare but be prepared if you shall catch a glimpse at something light blue! Requested by [**supersaiyansubtlety**](https://github.com/supersaiyansubtlety).

Spawn chances and other attributes are highly configurable.

More to come, open to suggestions as well!
